case_title: FAITH HO YAN YUEN VS. CHRISTEN ADELAIDE SCANLON ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-28-2024 CONTINUED TO OCT-30-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
